team_assumptions.notes: Assumes 8 story points per dev per sprint. S=2pts, M=5pts, L=8pts. Total capacity ~32pts/sprint across 2 backend + 1 frontend dev.

prioritized_backlog.title: Replace local community storage with NC API sync
acceptance_criteria: All community entity reads fetch from NorthCloud API (not local SQLite)
Community list page renders from NC data with <500ms p95 latency
Fallback to cached data if NC API is unreachable
No local community insert/update paths remain in application code
Integration test confirms community detail page renders from NC source

prioritized_backlog.title: Export communities as JSON for NorthCloud import
acceptance_criteria: CLI command bin/export-communities produces valid JSON with all 637 communities
JSON schema includes: name, inac_id, nc_id, lat, lon, province, nation, treaty
Output validates against a documented JSON schema
Unit test confirms export format matches expected schema

prioritized_backlog.title: Fix bin/sync-communities for v0.14.5-NC endpoints
acceptance_criteria: bin/sync-communities successfully syncs against current NC API endpoints
Handles pagination (200-per-page cap)
Reports sync summary: imported, updated, skipped, failed counts
Exit code 1 on any failure

prioritized_backlog.title: Community autocomplete returns HTML instead of JSON
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/communities/autocomplete?q=... returns Content-Type: application/json
Response is a JSON array of {id, name, province} objects
Playwright test confirms autocomplete dropdown populates on keystroke

prioritized_backlog.title: Cache NorthCloud API responses for community detail pages
acceptance_criteria: Community detail page loads in <200ms from cache on repeat visits
Cache TTL is configurable (default 1 hour)
Cache invalidation on manual sync trigger
Stale-while-revalidate pattern: serve stale on NC API timeout

prioritized_backlog.title: SQLite cache layer for NorthCloud API responses
acceptance_criteria: SQLite table stores cached API responses with key, body, etag, cached_at, expires_at
Cache get/put/invalidate methods with unit tests
Schema migration creates cache table on first run
bin/waaseyaa cache:clear command exists

prioritized_backlog.title: Prevent duplicate volunteer signups
acceptance_criteria: Submitting volunteer signup with an already-registered email returns a user-friendly error
No duplicate volunteer entity is created
Unit test confirms uniqueness constraint enforcement
Playwright test confirms error message displays on duplicate submit

prioritized_backlog.title: Add password reset flow
acceptance_criteria: /forgot-password page renders with email input
Submitting sends a password reset email via SendGrid
Reset link with token allows setting a new password
Token expires after 1 hour
Playwright test covers happy path: request reset, use link, login with new password

prioritized_backlog.title: Add validation error display to volunteer edit form
acceptance_criteria: Invalid form submissions display per-field error messages
Errors are styled consistently with other forms (red text, field highlight)
Server-side validation errors are rendered on the form, not as a generic 422 page

prioritized_backlog.title: Replace hardcoded demo data in templates
acceptance_criteria: teachings.html.twig, events.html.twig, language.html.twig, groups.html.twig render from entity queries
Pages show 'No content yet' empty state when no entities exist
No hardcoded demo JSON or arrays remain in template files
Integration test confirms pages render without errors

prioritized_backlog.title: Friendly error pages for 403/401 responses
acceptance_criteria: 403 responses render a styled error page with 'Access denied' message and link to homepage
401 responses redirect to /login with flash message
Error pages extend base.html.twig and follow design system
No raw JSON or stack traces shown to unauthenticated users

prioritized_backlog.title: Playwright tests for auth flows
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover: login success, login failure, register, logout, protected route redirect
All tests pass in CI (GitHub Actions with Chromium)
Tests use page objects or helper functions for auth actions

prioritized_backlog.title: Playwright tests for elder request and volunteer signup
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover: elder request form happy path, validation errors, volunteer signup happy path
Tests verify form submission success message appears
Tests run in CI alongside auth tests

prioritized_backlog.title: Playwright tests for content browsing pages
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover: communities list, community detail, teachings, events, groups, language pages
Tests verify page loads without errors (no 500s)
Tests verify key elements render (headings, card components)
Tests run in CI

prioritized_backlog.title: CC BY-NC-SA attribution metadata on all OPD-derived content
acceptance_criteria: All OPD-derived dictionary entries have attribution_source='ojibwe-peoples-dictionary' and attribution_url='http://ojibwe.lib.umn.edu' in entity metadata
Language page footer displays: 'Dictionary content is copyrighted by The Ojibwe People's Dictionary (ojibwe.lib.umn.edu) and used under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0'
No OPD content appears on any page without visible attribution
Unit test confirms all dictionary_entry entities carry attribution fields

prioritized_backlog.title: Media copyright flag and approval workflow
acceptance_criteria: Entity field copyright_status (enum: community_owned, cc_by_nc_sa, requires_permission, unknown) exists on all media-bearing entities
Entities with copyright_status=requires_permission or unknown are excluded from public rendering
Coordinator can set copyright_status via admin or CLI
No media with copyright_status != community_owned|cc_by_nc_sa appears on public pages
Integration test confirms filtering

prioritized_backlog.title: Data sovereignty controls and consent metadata
acceptance_criteria: consent_public (bool) and consent_ai_training (bool, default false) fields on teachings, dictionary_entry, elder_profile entities
Entities with consent_public=false excluded from public pages and API responses
Entities with consent_ai_training=false excluded from any future export or API that could feed AI training
robots.txt disallows crawling of /api/ and /dashboard/ paths
Data sovereignty statement page at /data-sovereignty renders and links from footer
Unit tests confirm consent field defaults and filtering behavior

prioritized_backlog.title: No-commercial-use enforcement gate
acceptance_criteria: No paid tier, paywall, or commercial feature exists in V1 codebase
LICENSE file includes CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 for content and a separate software license
Footer on all public pages includes: 'Community content is shared under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0'
CI check: grep for stripe, payment, subscription, paywall returns zero matches in src/ and templates/

prioritized_backlog.title: Security review (OWASP top 10)
acceptance_criteria: All forms use CSRF tokens
SQL injection: all queries use parameterized statements (verified by code audit)
XSS: all user-generated content is escaped in Twig templates (autoescape enabled globally)
Authentication: session cookies are HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Lax
No secrets in version control (verified by CI secret scan)
Rate limiting on login and form submission endpoints
Security headers: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Content-Security-Policy
Dependency audit: composer audit returns no critical vulnerabilities

prioritized_backlog.title: Accessibility audit (WCAG 2.1 AA)
acceptance_criteria: All pages pass axe-core automated checks with zero critical or serious violations
All images have alt text
All forms have associated labels
Color contrast meets 4.5:1 ratio (oklch palette verified)
Keyboard navigation works for all interactive elements
Skip-to-content link exists on all pages
Playwright accessibility test runs in CI

prioritized_backlog.title: CI/CD pipeline for V1
acceptance_criteria: GitHub Actions CI runs on all PRs: lint, PHPUnit (unit + integration), Playwright, composer audit
Main branch deploys automatically to staging
Production deploy is manual trigger (workflow_dispatch) with approval
Deploy uses Deployer with rollback capability
CI includes secret scan (no .env, credentials in repo)
CI badge in README shows current status

prioritized_backlog.title: Community list page: municipality support and mixed nearby
acceptance_criteria: Community list page displays both First Nations and municipalities
Nearby results mix both types sorted by distance
Type indicator distinguishes First Nation from municipality

prioritized_backlog.title: Location bar error state when geolocation fails
acceptance_criteria: Geolocation failure shows user-friendly message, not raw error
Manual location entry fallback is available

prioritized_backlog.title: Update Elder Support and Volunteer copy with reciprocity framing
acceptance_criteria: Elder Support pages use reciprocity language per content tone guide
Volunteer pages emphasize what volunteers receive, not just give

prioritized_backlog.title: Add introductory subtitles to all listing pages
acceptance_criteria: Each listing page has a subtitle below the heading following SHOW+TELL+INVITE philosophy
Copy follows content tone guide

prioritized_backlog.title: Add mission-aligned hero copy to homepage
acceptance_criteria: Homepage hero section has mission-aligned copy
Copy follows four narrative pillars

prioritized_backlog.title: Add flash message support for form success feedback
acceptance_criteria: Form submissions display success message on redirect
Flash messages auto-dismiss after 5 seconds or on click
Styled consistently with design system

prioritized_backlog.title: Integrate leadership extraction into main crawler pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Crawler pipeline extracts leadership data from community websites
Extracted data populates leadership fields on community detail pages

prioritized_backlog.title: Create production leadership scrape jobs
acceptance_criteria: Scrape jobs defined for all communities with known leadership pages
Jobs run on schedule via CLI/cron

prioritized_backlog.title: Link community sources for leadership scraping
acceptance_criteria: Community entities have source_url field linking to official website
Source URLs validated and stored

prioritized_backlog.title: Extract resolveLocation() to shared trait or service
acceptance_criteria: Location resolution logic extracted from controller to a reusable service
All callers updated, existing tests pass

prioritized_backlog.title: Add --dry-run flag to bin/backfill-nc-ids
acceptance_criteria: --dry-run flag outputs what would be changed without writing
Unit test confirms no writes in dry-run mode

prioritized_backlog.title: Outreach workflow with NC contact data
acceptance_criteria: Coordinator can initiate outreach to communities using NC contact info
Outreach status tracked per community

sprint_plan.name: Foundation & Compliance
sprint_plan.goal: Establish compliance layer, fix critical bugs, set up CI/CD pipeline
deliverables: CI pipeline running on all PRs (lint, PHPUnit, Playwright, audit)
Attribution footer on all OPD-derived content pages
CC BY-NC-SA footer on all public pages
Critical bug fixes: duplicate signups, autocomplete, error pages, form validation
sync-communities CLI tool working against current NC API
qa_tasks: Verify CI passes on a test PR
Manual check: attribution text visible on language page

sprint_plan.name: Core Features & Data Integrity
sprint_plan.goal: Complete NC migration, data sovereignty controls, password reset, real content

items.title: Replace local storage with NC API sync
SQLite cache layer for NC API
Cache NC API responses for community pages
Data sovereignty controls and consent metadata

sprint_plan.notes: Slightly over capacity — #175 can slip to Sprint 3 if needed. Backend-2 handles both cache items as they are tightly coupled.
deliverables: Community pages fully powered by NorthCloud API with SQLite cache
Data sovereignty fields on teachings, dictionary entries, elder profiles
All listing pages render from real entity data
Community export CLI for governance review
qa_tasks: Load test: community pages with cache cold vs warm
Manual check: consent_public=false entities hidden from public pages
Manual check: password reset email arrives and flow completes
Verify no hardcoded demo data remains in any template

sprint_plan.name: Production Hardening & Release
sprint_plan.goal: Security review, accessibility audit, Playwright e2e coverage, media copyright controls, release

items.title: Media copyright flag and approval workflow

sprint_plan.notes: QA runs Playwright work in parallel with security/accessibility. Final week is release prep and smoke testing.
deliverables: OWASP top 10 checklist completed with evidence
WCAG 2.1 AA audit report with zero critical violations
Media copyright_status field enforced on all media entities
Full Playwright e2e suite: auth, forms, content browsing
V1 tagged, deployed to staging, smoke tested, released to production
qa_tasks: Full regression: all user flows end-to-end
Accessibility scan with axe-core on all public pages
Security headers check (curl -I on all public endpoints)

should_items_sprint_allocation.note: Should items are scheduled opportunistically. If Sprint 1 or 2 finish early, pull from this list in order.

release_checklist.task: All Must items closed and merged to main
CI pipeline green on main (lint + PHPUnit + Playwright + audit)
License verification: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 attribution visible on all OPD-derived content pages
License verification: footer on all public pages includes CC BY-NC-SA notice
Media copyright review: all media entities have copyright_status set; requires_permission and unknown excluded from public rendering
No-commercial-use check: CI grep confirms zero matches for stripe/payment/subscription/paywall in src/ and templates/
Data sovereignty signoff: consent_public and consent_ai_training fields enforced; data sovereignty statement page live
Community governance review: no community data export without governance approval documented
robots.txt blocks /api/ and /dashboard/ from crawlers
Security review complete: OWASP top 10 checklist with evidence (CSRF, SQLi, XSS, session, secrets, headers, rate limiting, dependencies)
Accessibility audit: axe-core zero critical/serious violations on all public pages
Playwright e2e pass: auth flows, form submissions, content browsing — all green
PHPUnit pass: 252+ tests, all green, no skipped Must-scope tests
composer audit: zero critical or high vulnerabilities
Staging deploy and full smoke test (all public pages, auth flows, elder request, volunteer signup)
Production deploy via Deployer with rollback tested
Rollback plan documented and tested (Deployer rollback + database migration reversal steps)
Monitoring live: uptime check, error rate alert, response time alert
Release notes published
Community announcement sent

PR to main, push to main
PR to main, push to main

ci_cd_tasks.description: Run Playwright e2e tests with Chromium (auth, forms, content browsing)
ci_cd_tasks.trigger: PR to main, push to main

ci_cd_tasks.description: composer audit + secret scan (grep for API keys, passwords in tracked files)
ci_cd_tasks.trigger: PR to main, push to main

ci_cd_tasks.description: Grep src/ and templates/ for payment/stripe/subscription/paywall keywords — fail if found
axe-core scan on key public pages via Playwright
Auto-deploy main to staging via Deployer after CI passes
Manual trigger via workflow_dispatch; deploys to production via Deployer with rollback

risk_register.risk: Accidental commercial use of CC BY-NC-SA content
risk_register.mitigation: CI gate blocks any payment/subscription/commercial code in src/. Footer attribution on all pages. LICENSE file explicitly states content license. Code review checklist item.

copyright_status field required on all media entities. Default is 'unknown' which blocks public display. Coordinator must manually approve each media item. Automated test confirms unknown/requires_permission items are hidden.

risk_register.risk: Community data exported without governance approval
risk_register.mitigation: No public API exports community data. Export CLI requires explicit --confirm flag. Data sovereignty statement page documents controls. robots.txt blocks API paths.

risk_register.risk: Privacy leak via elder/volunteer personal data
risk_register.mitigation: Access policies restrict elder/volunteer data to authenticated coordinators. No personal data in public pages. Session cookies are HttpOnly/Secure. Security review covers data exposure paths.

risk_register.risk: Authentication/ACL bypass allowing unauthorized dashboard access
risk_register.mitigation: Playwright e2e tests verify auth redirects. Access policies unit-tested for all roles. Security review covers OWASP A01 (Broken Access Control). Friendly 403/401 pages prevent information leakage.

risk_register.risk: NorthCloud API unavailability breaks community pages
risk_register.mitigation: SQLite cache layer with stale-while-revalidate. Community pages degrade gracefully to cached data. Monitoring alert on NC API error rate. Cache TTL ensures 1-hour resilience.

risk_register.risk: AI training on community knowledge without consent
risk_register.mitigation: consent_ai_training field defaults to false. robots.txt blocks crawlers from content APIs. Data sovereignty statement is public. No bulk export endpoint exists.
composer audit in CI catches known CVEs. Framework is a sibling repo under same maintainer — patches can be applied immediately. Pin framework to tested commit hash for V1 release.

risk_register.risk: Incomplete test coverage masks regression in V1
risk_register.mitigation: Sprint 3 dedicated to Playwright e2e expansion. Unit tests at 252+ and growing. Integration tests boot full kernel. QA full regression before release.

risk_register.risk: Team capacity shortfall delays release by >1 week
risk_register.mitigation: Should items are explicitly deprioritized. Sprint plan has ~10% buffer in Sprints 1 and 3. Could items deferred to post-V1. PM monitors velocity after Sprint 1 and adjusts scope.

success_metrics.target: <1.5s for public pages, <500ms for cached community pages
252+ unit tests passing, 15+ Playwright e2e tests

dashboards_and_alerts.name: Error rate
dashboards_and_alerts.tool: Caddy access log + logrotate + simple grep cron
dashboards_and_alerts.alert: Email if 5xx rate exceeds 5% in any 15-minute window

dashboards_and_alerts.name: NC API health
dashboards_and_alerts.alert: Email if NC API unreachable for >15 minutes

dashboards_and_alerts.name: Cache hit rate
dashboards_and_alerts.tool: SQLite cache table query (hits vs misses in last hour)
dashboards_and_alerts.alert: Log warning if cache miss rate >50% sustained

dashboards_and_alerts.name: CI status
dashboards_and_alerts.alert: GitHub notification on CI failure on main

docs_and_communications.attribution_text: Dictionary content is copyrighted by The Ojibwe People's Dictionary (http://ojibwe.lib.umn.edu) and is used under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International License (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0). Community content shared on this platform is licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0.
docs_and_communications.contributor_guidelines_summary: All contributions must: (1) reference a GitHub issue, (2) include tests for new functionality, (3) pass CI (lint + PHPUnit + Playwright), (4) not introduce commercial/payment features, (5) respect CC BY-NC-SA on all OPD-derived content, (6) follow content tone guide for user-facing copy.

hotfix_window.scope: Security patches, data integrity bugs, and broken user flows only. No new features.
hotfix_window.process: Hotfix PRs branch from main, require 1 review, CI green, deploy immediately after merge.
hotfix_window.on_call: Primary maintainer monitors error rate and uptime daily.

rollback_plan.deployer_rollback: deployer rollback — restores previous release symlink instantly
rollback_plan.database_rollback: New columns (consent_public, consent_ai_training, copyright_status) are additive and nullable — no destructive migration. Rollback is safe without schema changes.
rollback_plan.cache_rollback: SQLite cache table can be dropped and recreated without data loss
rollback_plan.decision_criteria: Rollback if: (1) 5xx rate exceeds 10% for >15 minutes, (2) data corruption detected, (3) auth bypass discovered

ninety_day_roadmap.focus: Hotfix window. Monitor metrics. Collect community feedback.
Should items from V1 backlog: copy polish (#139-141), flash messages (#132), location error handling (#133), municipality support (#177)
Leadership scraping pipeline (#189-191). Outreach workflow (#179). Community governance consultation begins.
Grandparent Program MVP planning (v0.15 scope from roadmap). Elder profiles, volunteer onboarding, matching algorithm v2.

blockers.task: Pin Waaseyaa framework to a tested commit hash for V1
blockers.reason: Ensures reproducible builds and prevents unexpected framework changes from breaking V1

blockers.task: Verify framework CI passes (PHP 8.4, per ci-workflows-design.md Task 1)
blockers.reason: Framework CI must be green before Minoo CI can depend on it

nice_to_have.task: Framework security audit (composer audit, dependency review)
nice_to_have.reason: Ensures no transitive vulnerabilities in Minoo's dependency chain
Would simplify Minoo's OWASP rate-limiting implementation
Current CSRF may need review for form submission edge cases
